keyFeatures.en: AI content humanization to bypass AI detection tools
keyFeatures.zh: AI内容人性化，绕过AI检测工具

keyFeatures.en: Plagiarism-free rewriting while preserving original meaning
keyFeatures.zh: 无抄袭改写，同时保留原意
多语言支持，面向全球用户

weaknesses.en: Lack of transparent pricing and plan details on website
weaknesses.zh: 网站上缺乏透明的定价和计划详情

weaknesses.en: No clear information on content quality guarantees or accuracy
weaknesses.zh: 没有明确的内容质量保证或准确性信息

weaknesses.en: Potential ethical concerns about bypassing AI detection
weaknesses.zh: 绕过AI检测可能引发伦理问题

targetAudience.en: Content creators, marketers, students, and professionals needing to humanize AI-generated text
targetAudience.zh: 内容创作者、营销人员、学生和需要将AI生成文本人性化的专业人士

positioning.en: AI-powered tool for making AI-generated content undetectable by detection systems
positioning.zh: AI驱动的工具，使AI生成的内容无法被检测系统识别
